items.title: Custom AI agents

process.title: The OTMA method
process.subtitle: Four disciplined steps from first conversation to live agent.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We map your data, your workflows, and your real bottlenecks. No assumptions, no templates.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We architect the agent: data model, decision logic, integrations, and success metrics — all agreed before a line of code is written.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We build, test, and ship to your infrastructure. Typical time from kickoff to production: 8 weeks.

steps.title: Optimize
steps.description: We monitor, retrain, and improve the agent based on real usage data — continuously, not as a one-off project.

items.title: Built global, ready local
items.description: Founded in Riyadh and built for international enterprise. We understand KSA compliance, GCC data requirements, and global delivery standards.

items.title: Engineered, not hyped
items.description: No demos that never ship. Every engagement ends in production code, measured outcomes, and an agent that runs on your infrastructure.

items.title: Bilingual by design
items.description: Arabic and English are first-class citizens in every agent we build. Not an afterthought — a design requirement from day one.

cta.title: Ready to put intelligence to work?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your data, your workflows, and what's possible in 8 weeks.

services.page_subtitle: Six practice areas. Every one engineered to deliver measurable outcomes — not theatre.

custom-ai-agents.title: Custom AI agents
custom-ai-agents.hero_sub: Autonomous agents that execute work across your entire technology stack.
what_you_get: End-to-end agent architecture designed for your data and workflows
Integration with your existing ERP, CRM, and data warehouse
Audit trail and explainability for every decision the agent makes
Monitoring dashboard with live performance metrics
Ongoing optimisation included for the first 90 days
how_it_works: Week 1–2: Discovery and data audit
Week 3–4: Agent architecture and integration design
Week 5–7: Build, test, and iterate
Week 8: Production deployment and handover

crm-intelligence.title: CRM intelligence
crm-intelligence.hero_sub: Make Dynamics 365 predict, not just record.
what_you_get: Lead scoring model trained on your historical CRM data
Deal forecasting with confidence intervals by rep, team, and territory
Churn prediction with automated at-risk alerts
Embedded Power BI visuals inside D365 forms
Weekly model retraining on fresh CRM activity
how_it_works: Week 1: CRM data audit and baseline analysis
Week 2–3: Model development and validation
Week 4: Integration with D365 and UAT
Week 5: Go-live and sales team enablement

power-bi-ai.title: Power BI + AI
power-bi-ai.hero_sub: Dashboards that explain what happened and what to do next.
what_you_get: AI-powered anomaly detection surfaced directly in your reports
Natural language Q&A — ask your data questions in plain English or Arabic
Automated executive summaries generated from your live data
Predictive trend lines with confidence bands
Scheduled insights delivered to Teams or email
how_it_works: Week 1: Data model review and report audit
Week 2: AI feature development and integration
Week 3: Testing and stakeholder feedback
Week 4: Rollout and user training

conversational-ai.title: Conversational AI
conversational-ai.hero_sub: Bilingual Arabic and English assistants built for enterprise — not chatbot demos.
what_you_get: Full Arabic and English language support with natural dialect handling
Integration with your CRM, knowledge base, and ticketing system
Escalation logic that hands off to human agents when needed
Conversation analytics and intent tracking
Deployment on WhatsApp, web, or your existing channels
how_it_works: Week 1–2: Intent mapping and knowledge base audit
Week 3–4: Model training and integration build
Week 5–6: QA across Arabic and English
Week 7–8: Production deployment and monitoring setup

ai-strategy.title: AI strategy
ai-strategy.hero_sub: A 4-week sprint that turns AI ambition into a costed, boardroom-ready roadmap.
what_you_get: Full AI readiness assessment across data, infrastructure, and talent
Prioritised use case backlog with ROI estimates for each
Build vs. buy analysis for every recommended capability
12-month implementation roadmap with phased milestones
Executive presentation ready for board or C-suite review
how_it_works: Week 1: Stakeholder interviews and data landscape mapping
Week 2: Use case discovery and prioritisation workshops
Week 3: Architecture options and vendor analysis
Week 4: Roadmap finalisation and executive presentation

dynamics-365.title: Dynamics 365 modernization
dynamics-365.hero_sub: Migrate, optimise, and AI-enable your D365 deployment — with zero disruption.
what_you_get: Full health check of your current D365 environment
Data model optimisation for AI and analytics workloads
Migration from legacy systems with full data integrity
Power Platform automation layered on top of D365
AI features embedded across Sales, Service, and Finance modules
how_it_works: Week 1–2: Environment audit and migration plan
Week 3–6: Phased migration and configuration
Week 7–8: AI feature integration and testing
Week 9–10: Go-live support and team training

about.mission: To engineer AI agents that synthesize enterprise data into intelligent decisions — for businesses that demand outcomes, not theatre.
about.vision: To become the most trusted partner for enterprise AI in emerging and established markets — born in Riyadh, built for the world.
about.founder_bio: Khaled Ali is the founder of OTMA. With over 15 years of experience inside enterprise data and CRM — leading analytics and digital transformation across Saudi industry — Khaled saw firsthand how slowly enterprise AI was being adopted, and how much value was being left on the table. He founded OTMA to close that gap: bringing engineered, accountable AI agents to global businesses that need outcomes, not theatre.

values.title: Intelligent
values.description: Clear thinking, evidence-led analysis. Every recommendation is grounded in data, not opinion.

values.title: Optimized
values.description: Every system we build is engineered for measurable outcomes. We don't ship features; we ship results.

values.title: Trustworthy
values.description: Honest, accountable, and transparent. We tell you what AI can and cannot do — and we stand behind our work.

values.title: Bold
values.description: Confident, never loud. We take on hard problems, commit to them, and deliver.

about.where_reach: We deliver globally and serve clients across KSA, the GCC, Europe, and North America.

case_studies.page_subtitle: Real deployments. Real outcomes. No theatre.

items.title: AI agent for supplier evaluation
items.summary: A large manufacturing group deployed an OTMA agent to automate supplier evaluation across 200+ vendors. The agent processes RFQs, scores suppliers against 30 criteria, and surfaces recommendations in Dynamics 365 — eliminating a 3-week manual process.

items.title: CRM intelligence for credit risk
items.summary: A regional bank embedded OTMA's CRM intelligence layer inside their Dynamics 365 deployment. The system scores loan applications in real time using 18 months of historical decisioning data — reducing average approval time from 6 days to under 2.

items.title: Bilingual conversational AI for customer support
items.summary: A multi-brand retail group replaced their legacy chatbot with an OTMA bilingual assistant across Arabic and English. Integrated with their CRM and product catalogue, the assistant handles 78% of inbound queries without escalation.
